BAR_NOT_FOUND: The requested bar does not exist in the database.
CANNOT_REMOVE_LAST_OWNER: Cannot remove the last owner. Transfer ownership first.
CATEGORY_NOT_FOUND: The requested category does not exist.
ERR_CANCEL_ORDER: Network error cancelling order, action reverted.
ERR_CHECKOUT: Network error during checkout, action reverted.
ERR_DELIVERY: Network error processing delivery, action reverted.
ERR_PAYMENT: Network error processing payment, action reverted.
ERR_REMOVE_ITEM: Network error removing item, action reverted.
EXCHANGE_ALREADY_PENDING: This shift already has a pending exchange request.
EXCHANGE_NOT_FOUND: The specified exchange request does not exist.
INVALID_BAR_ID: The supplied bar ID is not valid.
INVALID_CREDENTIALS: The email or password entered is incorrect.
INVALID_DATE: The entered date does not have a valid format.
INVALID_EMAIL: The email address has an incorrect format.
INVALID_EXCHANGE: The proposed shift exchange is not valid.
INVALID_ORDER_IDS: The supplied order IDs are incorrect.
INVALID_ROLE: The assigned role is not a permitted system role.
MAX_LENGTH: The length of the entered text exceeds the maximum allowed.
maxLength: Must be at most {{ maxLength }} characters.
MEMBER_NOT_FOUND: The requested staff member does not exist.
MIN_LENGTH: The length of the entered text is below the minimum allowed.
minLength: Must be at least {{ minLength }} characters.
NOT_YOUR_SHIFT: You cannot modify this shift because it does not belong to you.
ORDER_ALREADY_PAID: This order has already been paid.
ORDER_ITEM_NOT_FOUND: The requested product is not in this order.
ORDER_NOT_FOUND: The requested customer order does not exist.
ORDER_NOT_OPEN: Cannot make changes because the order is already closed.
PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND: The requested inventory product does not exist.
SHIFT_NOT_FOUND: The requested work shift does not exist.
TABLE_ALREADY_OCCUPIED: Cannot start an order on this table because it is already occupied.
TABLE_NOT_FOUND: The selected bar table does not exist.
TABLE_NOT_OCCUPIED: The selected bar table is free.
UNAUTHORIZED: You do not have permissions to perform this action.
UNAUTHORIZED_SHIFT_ACTION: You are not authorized to manage this work shift.
USER_ALREADY_EXISTS: User already exists in the system.
USER_ALREADY_MEMBER: This user is already a member of the staff.
USER_CREATION_FAILED: An error occurred and the user could not be registered.
USER_NOT_FOUND: No user registered with that email address.

admin_dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
admin_dashboard.subtitle: Super controlled admin zone.
admin_dashboard.templates_desc: Manage standard bar templates used during bar creation.
admin_dashboard.search_desc: Search for a specific bar by its ID or Name. You can enter the bar with full owner privileges.
admin_dashboard.no_results: No bars found matching your search.

admin_templates.description: Manage, create, or bulk overwrite the standard system templates offered to new bars for import.
admin_templates.hint: Make sure the JSON is an array of categories, where each category has a name, icon, and an optional list of products (with name and price in cents).
admin_templates.title: Template Administration

toasts.load_success: Standard template loaded in the editor
toasts.update_error: Error updating templates. Please check the JSON format.

validator.invalid_array: The JSON must be an array of categories
validator.invalid_format: The JSON has an invalid format

ai_voice.title: Coaster Voice Assistant
ai_voice.placeholder: Say a command... e.g. "Create table Table 5" or "Add 2 beers to table 3"
ai_voice.empty_chat: Start a conversation with the assistant...

errors.mic_denied: Microphone permission denied. Please enable it in your browser.
errors.ai_gateway_failed: Sorry, the Artificial Intelligence service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.permission_denied: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.products_not_found: None of the requested products are available in this bar's menu.
